reviews.comment:
Las promotoras estaban más en la confitería que en su lugar de trabajo. El playero que tenía que atenderme no estaba en su lugar y demoro como 5 minutos en atenderme. Ningún otro playero se acercó para atenderme. Mala atención

(Translated by Google)
The promoters were more at the confectionery than at their posts. The attendant who was supposed to help me wasn't at his station and took about 5 minutes to assist me. No other attendant came to help me. Poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eF91bjZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta estación de servicio YPF está ubicada en la planta baja del edificio central del Automóvil Club Argentino. La entrada es por la esquina de la Avda. del Libertador y Tagle, y tiene varias bocas de naftas. No tienen GNC. Además brindan oteos servicios,  tales como lavado, cambio de aceites y filtros, etc. En el mismo edificio hay también taller mecánico, seguros, turismo, obtención de licencias de conducir Nacional e Internacional,  etc

(Translated by Google)
This YPF service station is located on the ground floor of the Automóvil Club Argentino's main building. The entrance is on the corner of Avenida del Libertador and Tagle, and it has several gasoline pumps. They do not offer CNG. They also provide other services, such as car washing, oil and filter changes, etc. The same building also houses a mechanic shop, insurance offices, tourism services, and offices for obtaining national and international driver's licenses, among other services.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eC11MWlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
hacen hacer una fila única de ingreso cuando no todas las islas de carga Tienen TODOS los surtidores de TODOS los combustibles.
Cuando existe una fila UNICA se supone que todas las islas disponen de TODOS los combustibles....un detalle tan simple de tener en cuenta habla de la DESAPRENSIÓN del ACA que genera cierta vergüenza!

(Translated by Google)
They make you have a single line for entry when not all loading islands have ALL the pumps for ALL fuels.
When there is a SINGLE line, it's assumed that all islands have ALL fuels... such a simple detail to keep in mind speaks to the ACA's LACK OF CONCERN, which is somewhat embarrassing!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1aDhTeE1REAE
